title: Relational Binding Structural Schema
description: Validates adpositions, coordinating conjunctions, and subordinating conjunctions (ADP, CCONJ, SCONJ) based on their syntactic attachment and binding functions.

token_class.description: The functional lexical class corresponding to the token's UPOS tag.

binding_type.description: The exact grammatical behavior used to tie syntactic units together.

attachment_target.description: Linear position of the clitic/word relative to its immediate structural host.

ud_deprel_default.description: The baseline Universal Dependencies dependency relation expected for this token class.

surface_forms.description: All standard phonological/orthographic realizations or allomorphs of this item.

structural_constraints.description: Explicit rule sets or restrictions for phonological contraction, morphosyntactic behavior, or hosting limits.
